title: Did all the Angels come directly from Adam
display_title: Did all the Angels come directly from Adam
wikitext:
[]: Did all the Angels come directly from Adam?             Quote Post by Zuggy » Mon Apr 14, 2008 11:03 am I've always assumed that the Angels came directly from Adam. The thought that some of the Angels could have come from other Angels only recently crossed my mind when I saw unnamed Angel 1 give birth to unnamed Angel 2 in NGE: 2nd Impression - and I thought seeing as we don't know what they've been doing in the ocean or out in space for 15 years (or just out in space and then the eggs later falling to earth) that they could have been up to all sorts of mischief. There have been some theories posted before which suggested that Ireul (and not Seele) was the one who cut the power when Matariel was approaching. Ireul then used the information it collected from when Nerv sorted out the power failure, which it later used when it went for the Magi. It has also been suggested before that Ireul rode in on Matariel's acid.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Mon Apr 14, 2008 11:08 am There's just one Angel in Second Impression, it goes thru metamorphosis like an insect.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Mon Apr 14, 2008 11:14 am Aah, I assumed they were separate because it looks like it divided itself to me.

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka's Plug Suit » Sat Apr 26, 2008 9:38 pm Maybe it's just splitting like Israfel...? When I first watched NGE, I figured that Tabris was created using the information gathered from Arael and Arimisael...and while I still think it's a neat idea, it's a WRONG neat idea. But who knows what the creators of 2nd Impression had in mind...since it was made before Misato threw all her cards on the table in AIR.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Apr 26, 2008 9:46 pm I assumed they were taking what Ritsuko said in 10 about Sandalphon being in "something like a chrysalis prior to the adult state" and running with it. The official trading cards for the 2nd Impression Angel literally use the terms corresponding to stages in an insect's life cycle: Larva, Pupa, Imago. Pupa = Chrysalis.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Tue Apr 29, 2008 4:16 pm I recall reading somewhere that Second Impact marked the end of creation of all new angels?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Apr 29, 2008 4:40 pm That's pretty damn silly, seeing as how the Second Impact is when they were all born.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Tue Apr 29, 2008 4:54 pm well, I guess its like a production cap?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Apr 30, 2008 4:12 pm I don't see how much of a "cap" it is since the Second Impact was the only chance Adam had to have ANY Angel children at all. *Landed on earth *Got pwned by the Lance of Longinus *Got reawakened by humanity *Caused Second Impact *Created 15 Angels *Turned into a fetus.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Apr 30, 2008 5:00 pm - Adam did not have to be skewered the day she arrived on Earth, only sometime after Lilith arrived. If Lilith's arrival was the trigger, the former scenario is somewhat dubious. If it wasn't... why would Adam's Spear skewer her? - The creation date of the Angels (Kaworu aside) is unknown . All we know (or can at least reasonably deduce) is that they got their souls at 2I. - Hence, there is nothing actually ruling out Adam cranking out unborn Angels prior to being skewered.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Wed Apr 30, 2008 6:29 pm what Reichu said: basically it could be either that: 1 - Adam gets awakened by Katsuragi Expedition, then rapidly gives birth to 15 Angel embryo/seeds or 2 - Adam actaully created the physical bodies of the Angel embryos/seeds....but they were lifeless husks because Adam had not yet imbued them with souls, when Lilith showed up. Katsuragi Expedition wakes Adam up, Adam spreads the souls to the embryonic Angels we're not really sure which happened, but I'm fairly certain we've narrowed it down to these two scenarios?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu May 01, 2008 5:04 pm I suppose so, but I don't see any reason why Adam would create the bodies and souls of his children at separate times. In my opinion, it's more likely the hold-up that allowed Lilith to inherit the planet was that Adam was preparing the ecosystem or something.

[]:             Quote Post by universalperson » Thu May 01, 2008 6:33 pm "Eliminate all life-forms in the Room of Guf."

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Fri May 02, 2008 12:47 am AuraTwilight wrote: I suppose so, but I don't see any reason why Adam would create the bodies and souls of his children at separate times.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Fri May 02, 2008 9:01 am It wouldn't be any stupider than Lilith's spear magicly finding it's way out of the Black Moon during 1I.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri May 02, 2008 12:56 pm "Eliminate all life-forms in the Room of Guf."

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Fri May 02, 2008 2:58 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Humans seem to pop out ensouled babies perfectly fine.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Fri May 02, 2008 10:39 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Humans seem to pop out ensouled babies perfectly fine.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri May 02, 2008 10:51 pm AuraTwilight wrote: I suppose so, but I don't see any reason why Adam would create the bodies and souls of his children at separate times.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Sat May 03, 2008 12:47 am How exactly did they revert Adam into a dormant stage again?

The thought that some of the Angels could have come from other Angels only recently crossed my mind when I saw unnamed Angel 1 give birth to unnamed Angel 2 in NGE: 2nd Impression - and I thought seeing as we don't know what they've been doing in the ocean or out
